inconclusive.note: the flagged renewal date has passed relative to real wall-clock today, but live_portfolio.json's last_renewal_date has not advanced past it -- inconclusive (the portfolio snapshot itself may simply be stale), not counted as a miss.

retention_ev_log.note: no realized-value join exists yet -- nothing in this codebase records whether a retention offer was actually made for a flagged renewal, or what happened after. Entries are logged here for track-record continuity only; grading them would require building that missing signal first, not inventing a result now.
